{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Red Crystal
| introduced = Threshold: Stories from Cradle
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Red Crystal]] is a technique used by [[Yan Shoumei]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
